title: sphaerocionium angustum
intro: Sphaerocionium angustum, also known as the narrow-stalked polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium angustum include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit anti-bacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
